## How verified

- [ ] `./scripts/validate.sh` passes
- [ ] `./tests/run.sh` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded user/home/project paths (`grep -r /home/ .` over tracked files is empty)
- [ ] Skill descriptions (if touched) start with "Use when…" and describe *when*, not the workflow
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under "Unreleased" (for user-facing changes)
